The '''GroundSweeper-3''' was a sensor unit employed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and manufactured by [[Tana Ire/Legends|Tana Ire]]. It was an [[Omniprobe sensor array/Legends|omniprobe sensor array]] and was usually mounted on a variety of ground vehicles. The device resembled a segmented dome and could be easily seen when placed atop weapons platforms. The GroundSweeper-3 worked by making low-level scans magnetically keyed to a planet's gravitational center. This allowed it to detect movement even when the target was outside the unit's line of sight. Although terrain provided no protection against its scans, the GroundSweeper-3 had a maximum altitude limit of 2 meters. For this reason, the GroundSweeper-3 was often used in conjunction with other sensor systems, such as the [[Siep-Irol/Legends|Siep-Irol]] [[GlobeScan]] and [[Melihat/Legends|Melihat]] [[UniScan Sensor System]], especially in defense of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] bases.
